definition: power consumption when the item is in a non-operating up state during non-required time and measured at rated ambient temperature and rated frequency

definition_ml.en: power consumption when the item is in a non-operating up state during non-required time and measured at rated ambient temperature and rated frequency

note:
1  Zero power consumption is only possible if the item is directly disconnected from its power supply, i.e. by disconnecting via an additional switch-off unit.

2  Power drain in the deenergized state results in thermal loss.

note_ml.en:
1  Zero power consumption is only possible if the item is directly disconnected from its power supply, i.e. by disconnecting via an additional switch-off unit.

2  Power drain in the deenergized state results in thermal loss.
